name: Spoonbread Custard with Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons butter, plus extra for greasing casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe mushrooms clean and cut into bite-size pieces.
2. Melt butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms and onion and cook, stirring until softened and onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer to a buttered 2-quart casserole and set aside.
4. Bring 2 cups water to boil in a saucepan and add 1/2 teaspoon salt. Put cornmeal in a small bowl and add the remaining 1/2 cup cold water, stirring to dampen the cornmeal.
5. Add the dampened cornmeal to boiling water, stirring constantly until thickened, about 1 to 2 minutes. Add buttermilk and stir to blend well.
6. Add eggs and stir until well mixed. Taste and add salt and pepper if needed.
7. Pour into casserole with mushrooms and onions and stir to mix well.
8. Bake at 375 degrees until light golden, 30 to 40 minutes. Serve hot.
[4 servings. Each serving: 195 calories; 586 mg sodium; 238 mg cholesterol; 14 grams fat; 7 grams carbohydrates; 10 grams protein; 0.51 gram fiber.]
